items.description: Active participation in frontend architecture decisions using React, TypeScript and Next.js. Design of scalable global state management systems and definition of reusable patterns focused on maintainability, performance and technical debt reduction.
achievements: Design of scalable global state management systems using Redux
Integration and consumption of REST APIs ensuring efficiency and consistency with the backend
Implementation of dynamic schema-based forms with react-jsonschema-form
Development of advanced filtering systems and complex interactions with @dnd-kit
Performance optimisation through lazy loading, memoisation and bundle reduction
Authentication and session management via Firebase
Technical debt reduction and codebase maintainability improvement through strategic refactoring
Agile (Scrum) workflows including ceremonies and continuous improvement

items.description: Development of projects using microfrontend architecture in React. Agile environments collaborating with multidisciplinary teams and cloud environment management in Azure.
achievements: Development of projects using microfrontend architecture in React
Collaboration with UX/UI teams using Figma
New feature development and incident resolution

items.clients: Prodigioso Volcán | Contents Area | BBVA IT | Extended Game
items.description: Design and development of multiple web platforms with Mobile First and Responsive Design approach. Frontend development for corporate platforms and graphic design for various clients.
achievements: Design and development of multiple web platforms with Mobile First approach
Frontend development for BBVA's internal investor and shareholder platform
Graphic design online and offline: visual identity, editorial layout and photo editing

items.description: Design of the new PANGEA product. Maintenance and implementation of the new product on the web in E-commerce format.
achievements: Design of the new PANGEA product
Maintenance and implementation of the new product on the web (E-commerce)

programming.frontend: React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Next.js, Redux, HTML5
programming.styles: CSS3, SCSS/SASS, LESS, Tailwind, Bootstrap, Styled Components, Emotion
programming.cloud: Firebase, Azure, Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, AI tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude)
programming.architecture: SSR / SSG, bundle optimisation, lazy loading, Core Web Vitals, REST APIs
